text: <par>Is it the first syllable or the third (or neither) that should be tagged 127 <latinform>s-yup⪤s-yip</latinform> “sleep” ?</par>
<par>BP pfx? <latinform>co</latinform> = <latinform>ka(t)</latinform>? <latinform>bra</latinform>: cf. SPLEEN p. 24 #35731 (and <latinform>bri</latinform> end p. 24)</par>
<par>But cf. the <latinform>ro</latinform> in Hair(pin). Same morph?</par>
<par>Which syllable (if either) is from this ety. root?</par>
<par>The last syll. a Tani suffix? Cf. Darang</par>
